_readme: Copy this file as config.json in the plugin root. Customize consensus/quality_rules for your project.

plugin._readme: Plugin-internal filenames only — resolved relative to the plugin directory. Do not use paths here.

consensus._readme: Evidence submission via audit_submit MCP tool → SQLite. planning_dirs are repo-root relative.

sections._readme: Section heading strings used to parse consensus documents.

doc_patterns._readme: Regex patterns and template strings for parsing and generating consensus document content.
doc_patterns.reset_criteria_text: The current scope requires `{focus}` correction and related lint/test re-pass before promoting to `{agree_tag}`.

quality_rules._readme: Run ESLint on edited TypeScript files under src/ or tests/.
quality_rules.label: eslint

quality_rules._readme: Run npm audit when package.json or lockfile is edited.
quality_rules.label: npm-audit

quality_rules._readme: Example: run Rust clippy on .rs files under src/.
quality_rules.label: clippy
